summary: Comprehensive testing of ideaGround platform completed. Critical bug fix verified - Dashboard page now loads correctly (was blank before due to TrendingTicker overflow). All core features working: Landing page with new logo, Dashboard with TrendingTicker and Market Activity, Video Player with Buy Shares, Portfolio, Wallet, Creator Studio, and Explore pages.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with new logo in header and footer
Sign in with Google button visible and clickable
Dashboard page displays correctly (BUG FIX VERIFIED - was blank before)
TrendingTicker scrolls at top of dashboard with stock symbols and prices
Video cards display with thumbnails, prices, creator info
Quick stats cards show (Wallet Balance $500, Videos Available 10, Creators 5, Subscriptions 0)
Content tabs work (All, Shorts, Full Videos)
Trending Creators section displays all 5 creators (Emma Dance, Joe Talks, Alex Roams, Sarah Tech, Chef Mike)
Market Activity section with Gainers/Losers/Hot/Active tabs - all clickable
Simulate button triggers price simulation successfully
Portfolio page loads and displays holdings correctly
Wallet page shows balance ($500) and transactions
Creator Studio page loads with 'Become a Creator' option
Video player page loads when clicking a video
Buy shares functionality works - modal opens, purchase completes, balance updates
Explore page loads with search functionality and video grid
Demo login endpoint works for testing authenticated routes
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard overflow fix (min-w-0 and overflow-x-hidden on main element) is working correctly
New logo URL (https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_ideaground/artifacts/lxdvr0pk_IG%20logo.png) loads properly in header, sidebar, and footer

test_credentials.demo_login: POST /api/auth/demo-login creates test session with session_token cookie

seed_data_creation: 5 creators and 10 videos pre-populated via /api/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Dashboard bug fix verified - TrendingTicker no longer causes horizontal overflow. Use POST /api/auth/demo-login to create authenticated sessions for testing. Session token can be set as cookie or Authorization header.

verified_bug_fix.issue: Dashboard page was blank due to TrendingTicker causing horizontal overflow
verified_bug_fix.fix_applied: Added min-w-0 and overflow-x-hidden to main element in AppLayout component (App.js line 121)
